examples: In spite of my worries and hesitance, the final choice is foredoom.
In this society in particular, there is a hesitance to touch one another.
And only in losing Catti-brie did I come to see the foolishness of my hesitance .
Was her hesitance to disclose the location an attempt to steer us clear of perilous jungle territory?
Relaxed and tolerant, they showed no signs of fear or hesitance, so synonymous with public gatherings today.
